title: Crunchy Fermented British Seaweed Salad
description: A savory and crispy dish featuring fermented seaweed mixed with bay leaves for a unique flavor profile that pairs well as a solo-dinner option.

ingredients.name: Fermented Seaweed
ingredients.notes: Use plant-based fermented seaweed available in health food stores.

ingredients.name: Bay Leaves
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried can be used. Fresh is recommended for optimal flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a light hand to maintain plant-based integrity.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Optional, helps soften seaweed slightly if necessary.

instructions: Rinse the fermented seaweed under cold water and pat dry with a clean kitchen towel.
Place the fermented seaweed on a cutting board. If using fresh bay leaves, tear them into smaller pieces for better distribution.
Sprinkle salt evenly over the seaweed, then place the bay leaves directly onto it.
Cover the entire mixture with cold water and let sit at room temperature for 10-15 minutes to soften any firmness in the seaweed.
Drain off excess water and gently shake out any remaining moisture from the seaweed. Break apart into smaller pieces if needed.
Gently mix all ingredients together until evenly distributed and the salt has fully incorporated into the seaweed.
Transfer to a serving dish and serve immediately for best texture.
